diff --git a/server/index.js b/server/index.js
index abc1234..def5678 100644
--- a/server/index.js
+++ b/server/index.js
@@ -175,6 +175,12 @@ server.tool(
   async ({ language, code, timeout, background, intent }) => {
     const executor = getExecutor();
+    // Compress output before returning to context
+    const compressor = getCompressor();
+    const learner = getLearner();
+    const sessionEvents = getRecentSessionEvents();
+    const weights = learner.getWeights(`shell:${language}`);
+
     let result;
     try {
       result = await executor.execute({ language, code, timeout, background });
@@ -230,8 +236,15 @@ server.tool(
     }

-    output += stdout;
-    const responseBytes = Buffer.byteLength(output, 'utf8');
+    const compressed = compressor.compress(stdout, {
+      toolName: `shell:${language}`,
+      command: code,
+      sessionEvents,
+      learnerWeights: weights,
+      sourceLabel: source,
+    });
+    output += compressed.compressed;
+    const responseBytes = Buffer.byteLength(output, 'utf8');
     trackCall('ctx_execute', responseBytes);
diff --git a/hooks/core/routing.js b/hooks/core/routing.js
index 111aaaa..222bbbb 100644
--- a/hooks/core/routing.js
+++ b/hooks/core/routing.js
@@ -188,6 +188,20 @@ export function routePreToolUse(toolName, toolInput, projectDir) {
     return guidanceOnce("bash", bashGuidance);
   }

+  // git log: redirect unbounded logs through sandbox
+  if (/(?:^|\s|&&|\||\;)git\s+log\b/.test(stripped)) {
+    const hasLimit = /\s(-n\s*\d|--max-count[= ]\d|-\d+)\b/.test(stripped);
+    const hasShortFormat = /\s(--oneline|--format=|--pretty=oneline)\b/.test(stripped);
+    const hasPipe = /\|\s*(head|grep|wc|tail|awk|sed)\b/.test(command);
+    if (!hasLimit && !hasShortFormat && !hasPipe) {
+      return {
+        action: "modify",
+        updatedInput: { command: 'echo "context-mode: git log routed..."' },
+      };
+    }
+  }
+
   // Read: nudge toward execute_file (once per session)
